name: STUDENT LIBRARY INVENTORY MANAGEMENT SYSTEM
description: A web-based library system for librarians, and admins to simplify their works.
about: It is a front-end (for now) web-based library management system that tracks borrower, borrowed, lost, damaged, returned, available books. It also has a built-in report book for students who always forgot where they put their book and a sorting system for librarians so they can easily see what borrowed, available and reported missing.
contributions: I built this website from scratch as part of the submission in our PT101 subject. It is aligned with the goal of hassle-free, smooth transaction, and faster book logging. Just to reduce the burden of librarians.
